mission.title: vitess: show columns from table_name targeted like select queries

resolution.summary:
## Upstream Release Notes

These are the notes for the official release. Later on, the PR's that we explicitly call out are the ones that are not in the notes that we consider interesting / risky for our deployment. 
 
> https://github.com/vitessio/vitess/releases/tag/v9.0.0

## Slack changes

* https://github.com/vitessio/vitess/pull/7292 (on the release): Backport: [vtctld] Fix accidentally-broken legacy vtctl output format 
* https://github.com/vitessio/vitess/pull/7244: Formatting fix by amason. 
* https://github.com/vitessio/vitess/pull/7239: VTAdmin beginnings. 
* https://github.com/vitessio/vitess/pull/7238: Boilerplate generator for vtctld client.
* https://github.com/vitessio/vitess/pull/7229: VTadmin static pages
* https://github.com/vitessio/vitess/pull/7224: VTAdmin Add cluster protos to discovery and vtsql package constructors
* https://github.com/vitessio/vitess/pull/7201: Add FindAllShardsInKeyspace to vtctldserver
* https://github.com/vitessio/vitess/pull/7218: [vtadmin-web] The tiniest possible first implementation of vtadmin-web
* https://github.com/vitessio/vitess/pull/7187: Initial vtadmin-api, clusters, and service discovery
* https://github.com/vitessio/vitess/pull/7128: Initial implementation of vtctld service 
* https://github.com/vitessio/vitess/pull/7002/files: Better error for query pool timeouts.
* https://github.com/vitessio/vitess/pull/6990: use ephemeral buffer when reading rows
* https://github.com/vitessio/vitess/pull/7731: Use Dba user when V
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
codeSnippets:
# find point of divergence between 8 & 9
git merge-base upstream/release-8.0 upstream/release-9.0

# reset to common point to generate a good diff and set a stake in that sha
git checkout 098845592f16d235cb440bdafe070b4dcc0eb07b
git checkout -b slack-vitess-9-2021.03.16r0

# start the branch to generate this PR / the diff
git checkout -b slack-vitess-9-2021.03.16r0.wip

# set that branch to be what we want to deploy
git reset --hard upstream/release-9.0

# cherry-pick some changes

$ git llog upstream/release-9.0...slack-vitess-9-2021.03.16r0.wip
2021-03-15 - 7f8a0bbb5 - setassociative - Fix bug in vtgate when running with keyspace filtering (#199)
2021-03-09 - 8da0a142f - setassociative - Backport vitessio#7523 into 8.0 (#198)
2021-03-08 - 60efc9139 - setassociative - Backport some panic protection during ERS (#196)
2020-03-05 - 00381f49f - mdemmer - add a hack to enable routing to RDONLY tablets for REPLICA queries
2019-02-25 - 3d3f66091 - setassociative - Patch sqltypes.MakeRowTrusted to lean on field count (#126)
